attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,
RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
SUM(MJET.DV_USD_AMT )/ COUNT( DISTINCT MJET.EMPL_ID) AS AVG_PER_HEAD_QTR	              
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL MJET
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY RMH
ON RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = MJET.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
AND RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = MJET.BK_COMPANY_CD 
AND MJET.EMPL_ID  <>'-999'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
ON 	MJET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = 	RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT	
GROUP BY RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT

SELECT RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,
MJET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
SUM(MJET.DV_USD_AMT )/ COUNT( DISTINCT MJET.EMPL_ID) AS USD_PER_HEAD                   
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL MJET
INNER JOIN 
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY RMH
ON RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = MJET.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
AND RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE = MJET.BK_COMPANY_CD 
AND MJET.EMPL_ID  <>'-999'
GROUP BY RMH.NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT,MJET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT

SELECT 
WMJET.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, 
WMJET.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT, 
WMJET.BK_COMPANY_CD, 
WMJET.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
WMJET.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY, 
WMJET.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT, 
WMJET.DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
WMJET.DV_USD_AMT, 
WMJET.DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
WMJET.APPLICATION_VERSION_CD, 
WMJET.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, 
WMJET.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, 
WMJET.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR, 
WMJET.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY, 
WMJET.AP_VENDOR_NAME, 
WMJET.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY, 
WMJET.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY, 
WMJET.EMPL_NAME, 
WMJET.EMPL_ID, 
WMJET.START_DTM, 
WMJET.DESTINATION, 
WMJET.END_DTM, 
WMJET.AIRLINES_NAME, 
WMJET.TRIP_NO, 
WMJET.AVG_PER_HEAD_USD, 
WMJET.AVG_PER_HEAD_QTR, 
WMJET.AVG_PER_HEAD_YEAR, 
WMJET.SS_CD, 
WMJET.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT, 
WMJET.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT, 
WMJET.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT, 
WMJET.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD, 
WMJET.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
WMJET.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD, 
WMJET.DD_BK_DEPT_CD,
WMJET.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD, 
WMJET.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD, 
WMJET.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WMJET.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WMJET.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
WMJET.EDW_UPDATE_USER 
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL WMJET
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL MJET WHERE 
 WMJET.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT = MJET.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT AND 
 WMJET.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT =MJET.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT AND 
 WMJET.BK_COMPANY_CD =  MJET.BK_COMPANY_CD AND 
 WMJET.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = MJET.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND 
 WMJET.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = MJET.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY)

SELECT 
BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, 
BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT, 
BK_COMPANY_CD, 
SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY, 
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT, 
DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
DV_USD_AMT, 
DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
APPLICATION_VERSION_CD, 
FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, 
TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, 
JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR, 
AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY, 
AP_VENDOR_NAME, 
VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY, 
EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY, 
EMPL_NAME, 
EMPL_ID, 
START_DTM, 
DESTINATION, 
END_DTM, 
AIRLINES_NAME, 
TRIP_NO, 
AVG_PER_HEAD_USD, 
AVG_PER_HEAD_QTR, 
AVG_PER_HEAD_YEAR, 
SS_CD, 
DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT, 
DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT, 
DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT, 
DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD, 
DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD, 
DD_BK_DEPT_CD,
DD_BK_PROJECT_CD, 
DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD, 
EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
EDW_CREATE_USER, 
EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
EDW_UPDATE_USER 
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL EL020OTE 
/* This table contains  data for company 020, Other T&E , before FEb 07 2010, to populate metro tool data  Commented as we are populating same data from 020oe */
where  1=2 
/*
not exists 
 ( select 1 from 
 $$STGDB.WI_MT_JEL_EMPLOYEE_TRAVEL_020 MT020 where
  EL020OTE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT  = MT020.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT 
and EL020OTE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT = MT020.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
 and EL020OTE.BK_COMPANY_CD = MT020.BK_COMPANY_CD
and  EL020OTE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = MT020.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 and EL020OTE.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = MT020.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY
  )
and  not exists
(
select 1 from 
 $$STGDB.WI_MT_JEL_EMPLOY_TRAVEL_020oe MT020oe where
  EL020OTE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT  = MT020oe.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT 
and EL020OTE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT = MT020oe.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
 and EL020OTE.BK_COMPANY_CD = MT020oe.BK_COMPANY_CD
and  EL020OTE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = MT020oe.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 and EL020OTE.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = MT020oe.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY
 ) */
